moments.title: World Cup Bronze Final
moments.blurb: England will face France in the FIFA World Cup 2026 third-place play-off after losing their semi-final to Argentina.

angles.name: England's last stand
angles.copy: After a hard-fought tournament, England battle France for third place in the World Cup tomorrow. Can they end on a high?

angles.name: Football fix
angles.copy: Still craving World Cup action? The bronze final is tomorrow, then the big one on Sunday. Who are you backing for third?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final
moments.blurb: Spain will take on Argentina in the highly anticipated FIFA World Cup 2026 final in New York/New Jersey on Sunday.

angles.name: The Big One
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Spain vs Argentina in the World Cup final on Sunday. Who lifts the trophy?

angles.name: Messi's Moment?
angles.copy: Can Messi lead Argentina to glory, or will Spain dominate the World Cup final? Don't miss the epic showdown this Sunday!

moments.title: Love Island UK Final Week
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with the grand final confirmed for Monday, July 27.

angles.name: Countdown to the final
angles.copy: The Love Island final is just over a week away on July 27th! Who are your frontrunners to win the £50k?

angles.name: Still hooked?
angles.copy: Another week, more drama in the villa! Are you still completely hooked on Love Island UK? Tune in nightly on ITV2 & ITVX.

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are either underway or starting this week across much of the UK, bringing a wave of family fun and travel.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for many across the UK! What are your plans for the next few weeks?

angles.name: Road Trip Ready?
angles.copy: With schools breaking up, the great British summer getaway is beginning! Where's your favourite UK staycation spot?

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen riff from the guitar maestro?

angles.name: Queen's Sound
angles.copy: From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', Brian May's guitar is iconic. Celebrate his 79th birthday this Sunday with Queen on Nation Radio!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana on Monday! Which of his timeless tracks gets you grooving?

angles.name: Smooth Operator
angles.copy: From Woodstock to 'Smooth', Carlos Santana's sound is unmistakable. Celebrate his 79th birthday with his greatest hits!

moments.title: David Hasselhoff turns 74
moments.blurb: Actor and singer David Hasselhoff, known for 'Knight Rider' and 'Baywatch', celebrates his 74th birthday today.

angles.name: Don't hassle the Hoff!
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary David Hasselhoff! What's your favourite 'Knight Rider' or 'Baywatch' memory?

angles.name: Looking good, Hoff!
angles.copy: Still got it at 74! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only David Hasselhoff today.

moments.title: Geezer Butler turns 77
moments.blurb: Black Sabbath bassist and lyricist Geezer Butler celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Metal Maestro
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the legendary Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath! What's your favourite Sabbath track?

angles.name: Bassline King
angles.copy: The man behind some of metal's most iconic basslines, Geezer Butler, is 77 today! Crank up some Black Sabbath!

moments.title: Martha Reeves turns 85
moments.blurb: Motown icon Martha Reeves of Martha and the Vandellas celebrates her 85th birthday tomorrow, July 18.

angles.name: Dancing in the Street
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Martha Reeves, the voice behind Motown classics, turns 85 tomorrow. What's your favourite Vandellas hit?

angles.name: Motown Legend
angles.copy: From 'Heat Wave' to 'Nowhere to Run', Martha Reeves gave us some of the greatest songs ever. Happy 85th birthday to a true legend!

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) turns 78
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday on Monday, July 21.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the legendary Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) on Monday! Which of his beautiful songs holds a special place for you?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: From 'Wild World' to 'Father and Son', Cat Stevens' music is truly timeless. Celebrate his 78th birthday with his classics.

moments.title: Selena Gomez turns 33
moments.blurb: Pop superstar and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 33rd birthday on Tuesday, July 22.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Selena Gomez on Tuesday! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Triple Threat
angles.copy: Singer, actress, businesswoman – Selena Gomez does it all! Celebrate her 33rd with her biggest hits on Nation Hits.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Thursday, July 24.

angles.name: Still Jenny from the Block
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the iconic Jennifer Lopez on Thursday! Which J.Lo anthem gets you on the dancefloor?

angles.name: Ageless Icon
angles.copy: From music to movies, J.Lo continues to dominate! Celebrate her 57th birthday with her biggest hits all day!

moments.title: New ITV Thriller 'The Dark'
moments.blurb: The new moody crime thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is now airing on ITV.

angles.name: New Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Need a new series to get stuck into? 'The Dark', a gripping new crime thriller set in the Scottish wilderness, is on ITV now!

angles.name: Eerie Scottish Drama
angles.copy: Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale star in 'The Dark', bringing eerie mystery to the Scottish countryside. Catch it on ITV!

moments.title: 'Elle' (Legally Blonde Prequel)
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', which follows a teenage Elle Woods, premiered on Prime Video on July 1.

angles.name: Bend and Snap!
angles.copy: The 'Legally Blonde' prequel 'Elle' is out now on Prime Video! Get your fix of teenage Elle Woods and 90s style.

angles.name: What, like it's hard?
angles.copy: Go back to high school with Elle Woods! The new 'Elle' series is streaming on Prime Video – perfect for a summer binge!
